instructions.siteEligible: true if the study should appear anywhere on the website for LM patients; false otherwise
instructions.rationale: Short evidence-based note from the ClinicalTrials.gov record

reviews.briefTitle: Melphalan in Patients With Neoplastic Meningitis
reviews.rationale: Official record is phase I intrathecal melphalan for recurrent neoplastic meningitis; eligibility requires malignancy metastatic to CSF/leptomeningeal space.

reviews.briefTitle: Monoclonal Antibody Therapy in Treating Patients With Brain Metastases
reviews.rationale: Despite the brain-metastases title, eligibility requires recurrent subarachnoid/leptomeningeal disease or CSF malignancy.

reviews.briefTitle: LMB-7 Immunotoxin in Treating Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Study is for leptomeningeal metastases, with eligibility requiring a primary intracranial or extraneural neoplasm plus LM involvement.

reviews.briefTitle: Monoclonal Antibody Therapy in Treating Patients With Leptomeningeal Cancer
reviews.rationale: Official record targets leptomeningeal cancer and includes GD2-expressing melanoma, lung cancer, and other solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Chemotherapy in Treating Young Patients With Recurrent or Refractory Meningeal Leukemia, Lymphoma, or Solid Tumors
reviews.rationale: Phase I trial for recurrent/refractory meningeal leukemia, lymphoma, or solid tumors with overt meningeal involvement.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Busulfan in Treating Patients With Recurrent, Refractory, or Metastatic Leptomeningeal Tumors
reviews.rationale: Intrathecal busulfan trial for recurrent/refractory/metastatic leptomeningeal tumors; LM is the core eligibility criterion.

reviews.briefTitle: Topotecan Hydrochloride in Treating Children With Meningeal Cancer That Has Not Responded to Previous Treatment
reviews.rationale: Children with meningeal cancer and overt meningeal involvement from leukemia/lymphoma or solid tumors, including medulloblastoma.

reviews.briefTitle: Temozolomide in Treating Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastases From a Solid Tumor or Lymphoma
reviews.rationale: Temozolomide trial specifically requires documented leptomeningeal metastases from solid tumor or lymphoma.

reviews.briefTitle: Busulfan in Treating Children and Adolescents With Refractory CNS Cancer
reviews.rationale: Intrathecal busulfan in children/adolescents with refractory CNS cancer metastatic to CSF/leptomeningeal space.

reviews.briefTitle: Topotecan in Treating Patients With Recurrent, Progressive, or Refractory Cancer That is Metastatic to the Lining Around the Brain
reviews.rationale: Eligibility requires neoplastic meningitis/leptomeningeal metastasis refractory to conventional therapy.

reviews.briefTitle: Radiolabeled MAB Therapy in Patients With Refractory, Recurrent, or Advanced CNS or Leptomeningeal Cancer
reviews.rationale: Study is for refractory/recurrent/advanced CNS or leptomeningeal malignancy, not brain-only disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Topotecan in Treating Young Patients With Neoplastic Meningitis Due to Leukemia, Lymphoma, or Solid Tumors
reviews.rationale: Neoplastic meningitis trial in leukemia, lymphoma, or solid tumors with CSF or MRI evidence of meningeal disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Lymphodepletion Plus Adoptive Cell Transfer With or Without Dendritic Cell Immunization in Patients With Metastatic Melanoma
reviews.rationale: Metastatic melanoma study; the official record does not require leptomeningeal disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Pemetrexed Disodium in the Cerebrospinal Fluid of Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Eligibility requires systemic malignancy or primary CNS lymphoma with documented leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Iodine I 131 Monoclonal Antibody 3F8 in Treating Patients With Central Nervous System Cancer or Leptomeningeal Cancer
reviews.rationale: Official record covers CNS or leptomeningeal cancer and explicitly includes melanoma, lung cancer, and other GD2+ tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Epothilone B in Treating Patients With CNS Metastases From Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer trial where CNS metastases include leptomeningeal disease in eligibility.

reviews.briefTitle: RTA 744 Injection in Patients With Leptomeningeal Disease
reviews.rationale: Leptomeningeal disease trial for any primary tumor type; the study purpose is LM treatment.

reviews.briefTitle: A Safety Study of RTA 744 in Recurrent, Progressive or Refractory Neoplastic Meningitis
reviews.rationale: Safety study of RTA 744 in recurrent neoplastic meningitis; record is LM-specific and tumor-agnostic.

reviews.briefTitle: A Study to Assess the Efficacy of Erlotinib for Leptomeningeal Carcinomatosis in EGFR Mutation Positive Non-small Cell Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: NSCLC patients with leptomeningeal carcinomatosis are the target population.

reviews.briefTitle: Study to Demonstrate the Safety of WBR Administered at the Same Time as Intrathecal Liposomal Cytarabine (DepoCyte®) Versus Intrathecal Liposomal Cytarabine (DepoCyte®) Administered After WBR for the Treatment of Solid Tumour Neoplastic Meningitis in Patients With or Without Brain Metastasis.
reviews.rationale: Solid-tumour neoplastic meningitis study, with or without brain metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Observational Study for the Cytofluorimetric Analysis of Cerebrospinal Fluid in Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma Patients
reviews.rationale: Observational CSF flow-cytometry study in lymphoma patients; eligibility excludes clinical or instrumental meningeal localization disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Liposomal Cytarabine and High-Dose Methotrexate in Treating Patients With Central Nervous System Metastases From Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer with CNS metastases, and eligibility requires leptomeningeal disease with or without brain involvement.

reviews.briefTitle: Bevacizumab With Etoposide and Cisplatin in Breast Cancer Patients With Brain and/or Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer patients with brain and/or leptomeningeal metastasis are eligible.

reviews.briefTitle: CHemoImmunotherapy With Early Central Nervous System (CNS) Prophylaxis
reviews.rationale: This is CNS prophylaxis for high-risk DLBCL, not a study of established LM or meningeal disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Trastuzumab for Leptomeningeal Metastases in HER2+ Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: HER2+ breast cancer patients with leptomeningeal metastases are the enrolled population.

reviews.briefTitle: Continuous Intraventricular Methotrexate in Treating Patients With Leptomeningeal Disease
reviews.rationale: Continuous intraventricular methotrexate for leptomeningeal disease; eligibility includes solid-tumor, leukemic, and lymphomatous meningitis.

reviews.briefTitle: A Clinical Trial to Assess the Safety & Efficacy of the Treatment of Patients With Metastasis From Malignant Melanoma - Treatment Consists of the Substances Lomustine (Capsules) & Cytarabine (Injected Into an Area Near the Spinal Cord), Accompanied by Radiotherapy of the Brain
reviews.rationale: Malignant melanoma study where enrollment requires leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Rituximab in Lymphoid Malignancies Involving Central Nervous System
reviews.rationale: Intrathecal rituximab is studied in lymphoid malignancies involving the CNS; the record also references leptomeningeal disease, but this is not a solid-tumor study.

reviews.briefTitle: Interest of Intrathecal Chemotherapy With Liposomal Cytarabine (DepoCyte®) in Meningeal Metastasis of Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer trial in meningeal metastasis confirmed by CSF, MRI, or both.

reviews.briefTitle: Circulating Tumor Cells and Cytology in Cerebrospinal Fluid of Patients Clinically Suspected for Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Study enrolls advanced EpCAM-positive solid tumors in patients clinically suspected for leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Clinical and Pharmacological Study With 2B3-101 in Patients With Breast Cancer and Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer and leptomeningeal metastases are explicitly the target population.

reviews.briefTitle: Circulating Tumor DNA in Cerebrospinal Fluid as an Early Biomarker of Leptomeningeal Metastasis (LM)
reviews.rationale: CSF ctDNA biomarker study in patients with solid tumors and signs/symptoms consistent with LM.

reviews.briefTitle: Oral Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitors, AZD3759 or AZD9291, in Patients Who Have Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: Advanced EGFR-mutant NSCLC study; the official record states that patients with leptomeningeal metastasis may also be enrolled.

reviews.briefTitle: A Phase 1 Trial of Intrathecal Rituximab for Progressive Multiple Sclerosis Patients
reviews.rationale: This is a multiple-sclerosis study, not a cancer or LM trial.

reviews.briefTitle: A Phase II Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Oral Ceritinib in Patients With ALK-positive NSCLC Metastatic to the Brain and/or to Leptomeninges
reviews.rationale: ALK-positive NSCLC metastatic to the brain and/or leptomeninges is the study population.

reviews.briefTitle: Prospective Evaluation Of High-Dose Systemic Methotrexate In Patients With Breast Cancer And Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Prospective breast-cancer LM study evaluating high-dose systemic methotrexate.

reviews.briefTitle: A Prospective, Observational Trial on the Diagnostic and Prognostic of LM
reviews.rationale: Observational trial of diagnostic/prognostic markers in advanced lung cancer with leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Phase 2 Study of Study of Tesevatinib in Subjects With NSCLC and Brain or Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: NSCLC with brain metastases or leptomeningeal metastases are explicitly eligible.

reviews.briefTitle: Intermittent High-Dose Lapatinib in Tandem With Capecitabine for HER2 Overexpressed/Amplified Metastatic Breast Cancer With Central Nervous System (CNS) Metastases
reviews.rationale: HER2-overexpressed metastatic breast cancer with CNS metastases including leptomeningeal disease.

reviews.briefTitle: Phase II Study of Intraventricular Methotrexate in Children With Recurrent or Progressive Malignant Brain Tumors
reviews.rationale: Pediatric malignant brain-tumor study includes disease on brain/spine imaging or CSF cytology and the record lists leptomeningeal neoplasm.

reviews.briefTitle: Expanded Access to ANG1005 for Individual Patients
reviews.rationale: Expanded-access record includes one patient with recurrent brain metastases and leptomeningeal carcinomatosis from breast cancer plus two CNS-tumor patients.

reviews.briefTitle: Local Ablative Therapy for Treatment of Oligoprogressive, EGFR-Mutated, Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer After Treatment With Osimertinib
reviews.rationale: Oligoprogressive EGFR-mutated NSCLC after osimertinib; the record does not describe leptomeningeal disease enrollment.

reviews.briefTitle: A Multi-center Prospective Observational Biomarker Study on EGFRm+ Non-small Cell Lung Cancer Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Biomarker study in EGFR-mutant NSCLC patients with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Ipilimumab and Nivolumab in Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Ipilimumab/nivolumab study is specifically in leptomeningeal metastases from solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Microfluidic Device to Diagnose Leptomeningeal Metastasis in Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: Breast cancer patients undergoing workup for suspected leptomeningeal metastasis are enrolled.

reviews.briefTitle: Intravenous and Intrathecal Nivolumab in Treating Patients With Leptomeningeal Disease
reviews.rationale: Intrathecal/intravenous nivolumab trial for leptomeningeal disease in melanoma and lung cancer cohorts.
